texto: I want things done right, and I was convinced that if I was in the middle of every decision, tings would be done right. My management style satisfied my need for power....By relinquishing control....I have even more power. Power is more than power OVER others. I'm not driven by a need to dominate; I'm driven to be competent.
explicacao: Citação de Bob Sullo sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I want things done right, and I was convinced that if I was in the middle of every decision, ting…” articula reflexao, control, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
